metadata.method_name: Two-Track CCRG K-track — taxonomic unit/specialist CONFLATION FIX (iter-4): precision-gated/weighted greedy rebuild (M2) + TRAIN/HELD-OUT fold split (M7) + non-random label-free count-matched selectors S-rec/S-prec/S-mag (M5) + homograph scope cross-tab (M3) + per-edge form-free KG + precision-objective ablation

iter4_fixes.M2_precision_gate: per-sub-context FIRING-precision gate + precision-weighted coverage objective in the anchored greedy (headline variant='gated').
iter4_fixes.M7_fold_split: absorber selection / gates fit on corpus TRAIN positives; AUC / precision / router REPORTED on the disjoint diagnostic (held-out) fold.
iter4_fixes.M5_nonrandom_controls: S-rec/S-prec/S-mag label-free count-matched selectors (free + anchored); set-cover ESTABLISHED iff unit beats all anchored on Georgia.
iter4_fixes.M3_homograph_scope: homograph x absorption-type cross-tab over all countries.

stats.auc_diff_ci: stratified paired bootstrap (resample positives & negatives separately)

fold_split.rationale: M7: gates/greedy fit on TRAIN positives; AUC/precision/router REPORTED on the disjoint diagnostic (held-out) fold.

honest_notes: LEAD hierarchy (M2/M7): the precision-gated rebuilt unit's Georgia member is 16009 (subctx precision ~0.97 sel / ~0.96 held-out), the precision-passing diagnostic-corroborated specialist — NOT the iter-3 low-precision 4697 (~0.35).

PER-EDGE KG (M2, reported separately, NOT a 3-edge mean): the form-free absorption_fraction is a MAGNITUDE oracle and on Georgia holes picks 1966 (precision ~0.36), the high-coverage representative; the precise member 16009 co-fires with it (firing-Jaccard ~0.36) so per-edge top-1 agreement with 16009 is ~0. The magnitude oracle is precision-blind; corroboration is via the PRECISION diagnostic + the router recall-hole signal, not the magnitude argmax.
Jordan n=124 (<150 -> DESCRIPTIVE/underpowered); router absorption_type=True parent_hole=0.7096774193548387.
Georgia AUC(unit)-AUC(h) diff=0.6120158730158729 CI=[0.5760878571428572,0.6475021428571428]: a genuine AUC-rank effect (unit AUC ~0.99 vs g/h below chance — the absorption signature).
United States: parent co-fires (Jaccard ~0.20, hole ~0.23) -> splitting not absorption_type; NOT a homograph-suppression slice.

HONEST: a non-SAE dense probe matches/slightly edges the unit on Georgia AUC; the contribution is auditable WITHIN-SAE precision-gated selection + the homograph router, not out-classifying a dense probe.
RE-k-anchored is the honest selection control (holds the high-recall anchor fixed, asks whether the set-cover choice of absorbers beats random eligible absorbers).

S_prec.criterion: selection-fold subctx FIRING precision (tie-break recall); NOT coverage -> non-set-cover

S_mag.criterion: mean content-response magnitude mean(A_on-A_off) -> strongest (parent-like) responders

S_prec_anch.criterion: selection-fold subctx FIRING precision (tie-break recall); NOT coverage -> non-set-cover

S_prec_free.criterion: selection-fold subctx FIRING precision (tie-break recall); NOT coverage -> non-set-cover

S_mag_anch.criterion: mean content-response magnitude mean(A_on-A_off) -> strongest (parent-like) responders

S_mag_free.criterion: mean content-response magnitude mean(A_on-A_off) -> strongest (parent-like) responders

formfree_magnitude_tension.interpretation: the form-free MAGNITUDE oracle picks the high-coverage LOW-precision representative of the same absorbed slice; the precision-gated member is Georgia-pure but NOT the magnitude argmax (they co-fire). Precision diagnostic corroborates; magnitude oracle is precision-blind.

homograph_crosstab.framing: absorption recurs on polysemous/homograph tokens WHOSE GENERAL PARENT LATENT IS SUPPRESSED (identified a-priori by the router recall-hole signal); it is NOT broad taxonomic absorption.

rebuilt_unit_transparency.fold_note: precision/jaccard/gain gates fit on the SELECTION (train) fold; subctx_precision_heldout and ALL AUC/router numbers REPORTED on the held-out (diagnostic) fold.
rebuilt_unit_transparency.compact_named_unit_note: taxonomic members are each a NAMED specialist (no 15-wide max-pool; that construction was the first-letter testbed); the compact named-unit AUC == the unit AUC.

fold_split.rationale: M7: gates/greedy fit on TRAIN positives; AUC/precision/router REPORTED on the disjoint diagnostic (held-out) fold.

honest_notes: SUGGESTIVE / diagnostic-UNCONFIRMED (M7): integer beats g/h on matched recall BUT KG mean top1=0.0 (0.0) and the dense probe AUC dominates -> NOT promoted.
RE-k-anchored is the honest selection control (holds the high-recall anchor fixed, asks whether the set-cover choice of absorbers beats random eligible absorbers).

S_prec.criterion: selection-fold subctx FIRING precision (tie-break recall); NOT coverage -> non-set-cover

S_mag.criterion: mean content-response magnitude mean(A_on-A_off) -> strongest (parent-like) responders

S_prec_anch.criterion: selection-fold subctx FIRING precision (tie-break recall); NOT coverage -> non-set-cover

S_prec_free.criterion: selection-fold subctx FIRING precision (tie-break recall); NOT coverage -> non-set-cover

S_mag_anch.criterion: mean content-response magnitude mean(A_on-A_off) -> strongest (parent-like) responders

S_mag_free.criterion: mean content-response magnitude mean(A_on-A_off) -> strongest (parent-like) responders

formfree_magnitude_tension.interpretation: the form-free MAGNITUDE oracle picks the high-coverage LOW-precision representative of the same absorbed slice; the precision-gated member is Georgia-pure but NOT the magnitude argmax (they co-fire). Precision diagnostic corroborates; magnitude oracle is precision-blind.

homograph_crosstab.framing: numeric has no homographs; integer is absorption-type via the numeric parent hole but is diagnostic-UNCONFIRMED (KG top1 0.0, dense probe dominates).

rebuilt_unit_transparency.fold_note: precision/jaccard/gain gates fit on the SELECTION (train) fold; subctx_precision_heldout and ALL AUC/router numbers REPORTED on the held-out (diagnostic) fold.
rebuilt_unit_transparency.compact_named_unit_note: taxonomic members are each a NAMED specialist (no 15-wide max-pool; that construction was the first-letter testbed); the compact named-unit AUC == the unit AUC.
